title: Use of English — Test 2
explanation:
Use of English — Test 2

More mixed A1 practice: tenses, prepositions and question forms.

questions.text: I was at home. They [*were|was|are] at school.
We [*are going|go|goes] to the beach today.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: This is the ____ day of the week. | *best | good | better
I need ____ water, please. | *some | any | many
He ____ TV every evening. | *watches | watch | watching
The correct question is: [*Where do you live?|What do you live?|Who do you live?]
